remotePipelines.name: TTEC
remotePipelines.note: Legitimate work-from-home customer service and support pipeline; promotes from within. Watch pay because some roles sit below $19.

remotePipelines.name: Concentrix
remotePipelines.note: Remote customer service / technical support; some tech-support roles are legit, but some pay around $15/hr, so filter hard.

remotePipelines.name: Kelly / KellyConnect
remotePipelines.note: Remote, hybrid, and contact-center roles; a good customer-support-to-tech-support bridge. Some roles post $17-$20/hr, so use $19 as the floor.

remotePipelines.name: Kforce
remotePipelines.note: Associate help desk and local contracts.

remotePipelines.name: TEKsystems
remotePipelines.note: Especially important because of its long partnership with Per Scholas.

alsoCheckAnywhere: Triple-S Steel Supply (in-house IT help desk)
Harris County (confirm pay carefully, some start below $19/hr)

searchTerms: technology apprenticeship customer service tech support
apprenticeships.payBenchmark: Recent Houston-area IT Apprentice postings have paid around $26-$31/hr.
